strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Current role at re:cinq involves TypeScript/Node.js and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP), matching the stack and AI requirement
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, and active community teaching
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, React depth is limited (only briefly noted at Optilyz), and Vitest is not listed
Kotlin is absent from the skill set; Java experience appears dated (robotic arms work circa 2016-2018)
Cloud/containerization signal is thin — Docker and AWS CDK mentioned but no clear Kubernetes production depth or GCP/Azure exposure

key_factors.factor: Senior-level breadth and craftsmanship track record
Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, and modern React depth

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years bar and currently works in TypeScript/Node.js with hands-on AI-agent and MCP infrastructure experience, which directly maps to a key requirement. The craftsmanship signal (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, OSS) is unusually strong for a fullstack IC role. The main risks are stack-specific gaps — Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are not evidenced, and the React footprint is modest — but these are reasonable to probe in an interview rather than disqualify on.
